title: マイルCSの後に・年度代表なるか？

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Dang, Suzuka's faster than greased lightning! I
just couldn't keep up.

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: But it was real exciting! I had loads of fun!

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Good match today, Taiki.

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: Oh, Suzuka!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
I might've lost this one, but next time's gonna be
a whole 'nother story!

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: I see... Well, I don't intend to let go of the lead.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
But you ran incredibly well today. You were so
powerful... and your speed was utterly
spellbinding.

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: Ya really think so? That means a lot! Thanks! ♪

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: No... I should be the one saying thanks.

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: What?

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: I came here to thank you.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
When we were running, your speed struck me to
my core...

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: It helped me realize something.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: So... thank you.

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: Umm, sure...

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
If that's how ya feel, then I'm awful glad I could
help!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
But I ain't goin' down next time either! Where're
ya thinkin' of heading next?

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
Actually... I'm going to Hong Kong. There's
something I don't want to lose sight of.

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Are you for real?! That's some grit you've got!
You're somethin' else, Suzuka!

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
That means I won't see you for a while. What are
your plans, Taiki?

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Hm... I'm gonna keep running in more and more
races. I wanna see how fast I can go!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: Next up is the Yasuda Kinen!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With that, the Mile Championship draws to a
close.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Such overwhelming speed...

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: But... I'll get there one day!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
I just got off the phone with my folks! They were
tickled pink at the good news!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: But the real surprise is still to come!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: When I become Umamusume of the Year, they'll be in for even more of a treat!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
How 'bout it, Trainer? You think I did well enough
to be Umamusume of the Year?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I think she's done all she can possibly do as a
sprinter.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
But there's no denying that there are other
Umamusume who have done exceptionally well
this past year...
choice_data_list: Let's wait for the announcement in January.

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: Ooh, I don't think I can handle the suspense!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
But training's sure to take my mind off things! If I
just keep on runnin', January'll be here quick as a
wink!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
All right! I've got more running to do till I'm
Umamusume of the Year!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We continue training diligently for the upcoming
Yasuda Kinen, awaiting the announcement of the
next Umamusume of the Year...
